title: Return to Yucca Flats: Desert Man-Beast
original_title: Return to Yucca Flats: Desert Man Beast
overview: A beastly man beast roams the Arizona desert in search of blood, boobs and a plot. From the creators of Blown and Back Woods comes the sequel no one asked for, Return to Yucca Flats Desert Man Beast!
